For PostgreSQL nodes experiencing high contention, consider increasing shared buffers ('shared_buffers = 256MB') and adjusting the effective cache size ('effective_cache_size = 128MB').

customer_query: Kafka broker 'orders-broker' suddenly stopped accepting messages due to expired SSL certificate. This is affecting real-time event processing.
failure_log: Error: Unable to establish connection to <broker ID> due to missing peer certificate
technical_resolution: Update Kafka broker's SSL certificate using command `kafka-configs --update --bootstrap-server <broker IP>:9092 --config ssl.certificate.path=/path/to/new/cert`.

customer_query: Customer Service Representative portal experiencing intermittent authentication failures, affecting access to critical order management features.
failure_log: Error: Unable to authenticate user <username> due to invalid credentials
technical_resolution: Verify CSR login credentials and restart the portal service if necessary using command `csr-portal-service restart`.
